input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Hwax has a direct effect on kraz and pexu. Pexu has a direct effect on rukz. Kraz has a direct effect on rukz. The overall probability of pexu is 82%. The probability of not pexu and rukz is 13%. The probability of pexu and rukz is 47%. Is the chance of rukz smaller when observing pexu?
